package.name: fast_slam
package.description: FastSLAM 1.0 for ROS 2 Humble. Implements the FastSLAM 1.0 algorithm (Montemerlo et al., 2002) for landmark-based simultaneous localisation and mapping using range-bearing observations extracted from a 2-D laser scan. Subscribes to /scan and /odom (articubot), publishes particle cloud, best-estimate pose, estimated landmark map, and best-particle trajectory.
